2606.23631.title: AI-driven Optimisation of Quality of Recovery (QoR) in Remote Patient Monitoring
2606.23631.paper_summary: Remote patient monitoring depends on patient-reported data to capture the subjective dimension of recovery that devices cannot measure. The Quality of Recovery (QoR-15) survey is the gold-standard instrument for this purpose. It was designed and validated for occasional in-hospital assessment, yet remote monitoring now administers it to patients daily. In our own post-surgical deployment, only 55% of patients submitted the survey more than 14 days of 30 monitoring days. We developed QoR-compact, a five-item daily input for the RPM prediction pathway. Setting a deployment-driven target of one-third of the daily items, we exhaustively evaluated all 3,003 five-question subsets of the QoR-15 and tested whether the best of them matches the full instrument in predicting near-term postoperative recovery severity. QoR-compact achieves a mean AUC-ROC of 0.968 (95% CI 0.915-0.988), statistically comparable to the 0.964 baseline obtained with one-third of the items. Patient-level backtesting indicates that it tracks readmission events as faithfully as the full form. Its five items span the physical and psychological axes of recovery: Q3 (feeling rested), Q9 (feeling comfortable and in control), Q10 (general well-being), Q12 (severe pain), and Q14 (feeling worried or anxious). The QoR-15 remains the gold-standard measure of recovery; QoR-compact complements it as a shorter daily input designed for prediction. This parity provides the basis for a prospective study of whether a lighter daily input is, in turn, completed more consistently. External validation on larger cohorts is required before clinical use.
2606.23631.paper_summary_zh: 遠程病人監測依賴病人報告的數據來捕捉設備無法測量的主觀康復維度。恢復質量（QoR-15）調查是這一目的的金標準工具。它是為偶爾的住院評估而設計和驗證的，但現在遠程監測每天都向病人進行此調查。在我們自己的術後部署中，只有55%的病人在30個監測日中提交了超過14天的調查。 我們開發了QoR-compact，一個五項每日輸入的RPM預測路徑。設定一個以部署為驅動的目標，即每日項目的三分之一，我們對所有3,003個五題子集進行了徹底評估，並測試其中最佳的子集在預測近期術後康復嚴重性方面是否與完整工具相匹配。 QoR-compact的平均AUC-ROC為0.968（95% CI 0.915-0.988），在統計上可與使用三分之一項目獲得的0.964基線相媲美。病人級別的回測表明，它能如完整形式一樣忠實地追踪再入院事件。它的五個項目涵蓋了康復的身體和心理軸心：Q3（感覺休息好）、Q9（感覺舒適且能掌控）、Q10（整體健康）、Q12（劇烈疼痛）和Q14（感覺擔心或焦慮）。QoR-15仍然是康復的金標準測量；QoR-compact作為一個更短的每日輸入，旨在進行預測。這種平行性為前瞻性研究提供了基礎，研究輕量級每日輸入是否能更一致地完成。在臨床使用之前，需要對更大樣本進行外部驗證。
2606.23631.author: Yansong Liu et.al.
2606.23631.authors: Yansong Liu,  Li-Hsi,  Lin, Pramit Khetrapal, Ronnie Stafford, John Kelly, Ivana Drobnjak
